Name: 11-wr08-heating_systems
Title: Primary Heating System in Dwellings
Description:
**Residential Heating in Austria: National Trends and Regional Diversity**
In the broader context of Austria’s energy balance, thermal energy is a heavyweight: more than half of the country's final energy consumption is dedicated to heat production. A significant portion of this energy fuels the heating systems of Austria’s roughly four million primary residences.
**The National Heating Mix**
While the transition to renewables is underway, fossil fuels still maintain a significant footprint. As of the current reporting period, the national breakdown of heating systems across all primary residences is as follows:
